speaker: speaker1
text: Today I want to invite you to talk about insurance you ’ re interested in .

speaker: speaker2
text: Thank you . I wonder whether I can enjoy the life insurance and health insurance .

speaker: speaker1
text: Of course . A two-week paid vacation a year , a five-day workweek .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , all the insurance will be linked with your work . We will issue an insurance policy .
